Name: Akeyless - Retrieve Rotated Secret
Description:
This step retrieves a **rotated secret** from Akeyless and creates sensitive [output variables](https://octopus.com/docs/projects/variables/output-variables#sensitive-output-variables) for use in later deployment or runbook steps.

This step template uses the [Akeyless REST API](https://docs.akeyless.io/reference/getrotatedsecretvalue), so no other dependencies are needed.

---

**Authentication token**

Use any Akeyless login step template first, then bind the Auth Token parameter to:

#{Octopus.Action[<Login step name>].Output.AkeylessAuthToken}

---

**Linked targets**

For rotated secrets associated with linked targets, set **Host** to the target host name.

---

**Required:**
- Authentication token
- Rotated secret path

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.GatewayUrl
Parameters.HelpText: The Akeyless API or Gateway URL. For SaaS, use https://api.akeyless.io.
Parameters.Label: Gateway URL

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.AuthToken
Parameters.HelpText: Authentication token from a previous Akeyless login step.
Parameters.Label: Auth Token

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.SecretPath
Parameters.HelpText: Full path to the rotated secret, e.g. `/production/database/rotated`
Parameters.Label: Secret path

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.OutputVariableName
Parameters.HelpText: Optional output variable name when the rotated secret returns a single value.
Parameters.Label: Output variable name

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.FieldValues
Parameters.HelpText: Choose specific response fields in the format FieldName | OutputVariableName.
Parameters.Label: Field names

Parameters.Name: Akeyless.Retrieve.Rotated.PrintVariableNames
Parameters.HelpText: Write created output variable names to the task log.
Parameters.Label: Print output variable names
